case_title: EDEN, LAURIE ELLEN vs. WHITLEY, NADINE DANSBY et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATOR APPOINTED, ITTIG, ROBERT GERARD (127279), ARB-5 MAILED

CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM ARBITRATOR ITTIG ROBERT G RE: PARTIES DOES NOT WISH TO ARBITRATE MATTER PRIOR TO THE 03-MAR-94 DEADLINE. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL HAS PREPARED A STIPULATION TO REQUEST COURT PERMISSION TO EXTEND THE TIME.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDEN, LAURIE ELLEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITLEY, NADINE DANSBY SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY $6,538.70 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,538.70, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT
